title: Friends For Life
description: Take your pets on your next adventure with this QoL mod!
body:
<center>
  
![Title image reading "Friends for Life" with a paw print on the left.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c031f67ab9023e0f05dfca30252f35da6a0e46b.png)

Bring your pets along for the journey with _Friends For Life!_

</center>

Never worry about losing a pet again. Once a pet is equipped with a **Friendship Collar**, and depending on the set behavior mode, it becomes invulnerable and fully protected.

Use the **Ocarina** to instantly **summon your pet to your side, across dimensions,** or play it again to send them **back home** safely.

Pets **will wander around their home area** instead of sitting in one spot, giving your base a more lively and natural feel!

Have a big pack of animals? The **Pet Roster** helps you keep track of every companion you’ve bonded with. View them all in one place, manage their settings, change their behavior mode, and stay organized no matter how many pets you have.

<center>

![Decorative image of paw prints going in a line.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d7d33c8cc5481ac673616fbc8e91a207d01598d.png)

# How it works

_Friends For Life_ introduces 3 unique items, the Collar, Ocarina, and Roster. 

</center>

<center>

## The Collar

  
![Image showing the crafting recipe for the Collar item. It requires 1 Leather and 1 Gold Bar.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cda197bcaf4a99e0c18a64cdf9f97c8646e7b608.png)

</center>


The Collar can be put on your tamed pet to make them invincible!

Once your pet is equipped with a collar, they become a Forever Pet, and will no longer take any damage from any source outside of creative/the void. If your Forever Pet does somehow perish, they will _always_ come when you call them!

Sneak+Right-Click while holding the Collar to register a home point to the block you're looking at. When the collar is put on a pet, the pet's home will be set to that location! Whenever you send it home using the Ocarina or the Roster, it will return to that location. It will also wander around the location you set.

Your pet will now be registered in the Roster, and can have an Ocarina bound to it to teleport it to your location.

<center>
  
## The Ocarina

  
![Gif showing the crafting recipe for the Ocarina item. It requires a line of 3 Terracotta of any color. The gif shows all 17 color options.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1811e3db4b3dc582466e0424095626a8dc9d220a.gif)

</center>

The Ocarina is a magical item that allows you to call your Forever Pets. Sneak+Right-Click a Forever Pet with the Ocarina to bind the Ocarina to it. Now, whenever you play the Ocarina, your Forever Pet will be summoned to your side! They will follow you as normal.

You can send your Forever Pet back home, either to the default Home location, set by the Roster, or the position set by their Collar. To do so, Sneak+Right-Click while holding the Ocarina.

Using different Terracotta blocks, you can choose from 17 different color options!

<center>
  
## The Roster

  
![Image showing the in-game Roster menu that the mod adds.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AlvqcCSq/images/2b25cb12d8d1cfdda8d68f7c5a27e346ccf5cb8c.png)
![Roster crafting recipe that requires 1 Gold Bar and 1 Book.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8a9711c64f80bc238cbcd6cd8ad97b49eb044df.png)

</center>

The Roster is a book that lists all of your Forever Pets. You can use the roster to view stats, change behavior modes, summon them, or send them home. The Roster includes the location of your pet, as well as its home location. You can open the Roster with a keybind (default: P).

Sneak+Right-Click while holding the Roster on a block will set the default Home location for all your Forever Pets. If your Pets don't have their own unique home, they will be sent here. If the Home location isn't set, they will be sent to your respawn point.

**NOTE:** If your Home location isn't set and you haven't set your respawn point, your pets will be sent to spawn.

<center>
  
## Behavior Modes
![Close up of the Behavior Mode Icons you can find in the Roster.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/636d433d5f09e0bf313e0d8065e2b8b245ce478f.png)

</center>

In the top right corner of the pet portrait in the Roster, you'll find a button that lets you toggle your pet's behavior. The default setting will be Companion Mode (heart icon), however clicking it will switch it to the other mode option. 

Companion Mode will make your pet 100% invulnerable and 100% peaceful so you can adventure at ease. 

Meanwhile Guardian Mode (shield icon) will have your pet will behave like vanilla mobs, however, instead of dying when their hearts hit zero, they will teleport back to their Home location and "heal back up" forcing you to wait 60 seconds before summoning them again. 

**NOTE:** The cooldown time limit can be customized using via "petRespawnTimer" in the config.
<center>

![Decorative image of paw prints going in a line.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d7d33c8cc5481ac673616fbc8e91a207d01598d.png)

# Compatability

</center>

This mod is designed to be compatible with modded pets, specifically tameable animals, but this isn't a guarantee _all_ modded pets will work.


<center>
  
# Planned Updates

</center>

Nothing for now!

<center>

![Decorative image of paw prints going in a line.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d7d33c8cc5481ac673616fbc8e91a207d01598d.png)
